source.body_text_sample:

Make A Referral
Work With Us

We are always looking for good people who want to make a difference doing challenging and rewarding work. If you are looking for employment, volunteer or practicum opportunities; to open your home to a youth or adult in need; or to provide coverage to others that do, you’ve come to the right place.

This role is about providing a safe, nurturing home to a youth in need, giving them a sense of belonging and assisting them to be more successful.

We’re looking for individuals willing to share their own home with adults who, due to complex challenges and health conditions, cannot live on their own.

Working directly for our family caregivers this role is about providing short-term and/or overnight coverage in their home when they can’t be there.

If you are already working at PLEA, and are interested in applying to a new role, click here and navigate to the ‘My Opportunities’ page under ‘Myself’ and ‘My Company’.

Remember to upload your most up-to-date resume!

Not currently working at PLEA but would love to do so? Click here to see our available opportunities.

To make the application process as easy as possible, we recommend uploading your resume directly into the system! From there, the application might only take 10-15 minutes to complete. Take as much time as you need!

Become a volunteer mentor with KidStart (aged 6-18) or Kinnections (aged 19-24) and sup
